codeReview.summary: Comprehensive smoke test implementation for structured output across all three providers (OpenAI, Ollama, Google). Tests cover generateStructured, tryParseStructured (success and failure paths), streaming structured output, and vision+structured output combinations. The implementation correctly validates against real APIs and includes graceful handling for features that may not be supported by all server/model implementations.

summary: PASS: The smoke tests feature is well-implemented with comprehensive coverage of VAL-API-001, VAL-API-006, VAL-API-007, VAL-API-008, VAL-PROVIDER-OPENAI-003, VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-003, VAL-PROVIDER-OPENAI-004, VAL-PROVIDER-OLLAMA-005, and VAL-PROVIDER-GOOGLE-005 validation assertions. Tests were run against real APIs (LlamaCpp at blade14:8080, local Ollama at localhost:11434, and Google Gemini) and all 36 tests pass. The worker followed TDD principles from the backend-worker skill and properly verified all tests pass before committing.
